raw_responses.query: LLM attention sink cortical microcircuit noise floor sparse coding 2025 arxiv

results.title: When Attention Sink Emerges (ICLR 2025)
results.snippet: LLMs allocate significant attention to initial tokens irrespective of semantic relevance — attention sink. Attributed to large norm of first-token hidden states.

results.title: Gated Attention LLMs Attention-Sink-Free
results.snippet: Sigmoid gate after SDPA improves performance; sparse gating mitigates attention sink.

results.title: Threshold Differential Attention for Sink-Free Ultra-Sparse
results.snippet: Threshold differential attention mitigates attention sink.

results.title: Sparse Frontier: Sparse Attention Trade-offs in Transformer LLMs
results.snippet: Long-context attention scaling trade-offs in transformer LLMs.

results.title: Progressive Sparse Attention LLM Serving
results.snippet: Progressive sparse attention for LLM serving.
